overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit city street. The player moves from a covered walkway past vending machines and a pawn shop, stops briefly at a food vendor cart, then continues down the wet sidewalk.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway illuminated by vibrant purple neon lights. The camera moves forward along the concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian walking the opposite way. A blue street sign reading 'Berkeley Ave' is visible on the left wall, while digital billboards and modern glass buildings line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with heavy rain and commercial storefronts

weather exposure changes from sheltered to heavy rainfall

agents.ego_description: walking through heavy rain along the wet sidewalk

entered.detail: pair of bright purple and yellow vending machines labeled THE LOVER
yellow and black illuminated sign with green neon border
storefront with metal shutters and green neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into heavy rain. The scene features prominent purple and yellow vending machines and the 'El Dorado Pawn Shop' with its distinctive yellow signage. A futuristic car is parked on the left, and the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor cart under building overhang

stops walking to observe the vendor at the food cart

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrow sheltered area under a building overhang where a food vendor operates a bright red neon-lit cart. The vendor cooks on the grill while a customer approaches and engages in conversation. The heavy rain continues to fall in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy city sidewalk with distant neon storefronts

events.description: resumes walking away from vendor cart down the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking away from vendor down the rain-soaked sidewalk toward distant lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: warm orange illuminated doorway at the end of the street
low horizontal illuminated billboard with white lighting

segments.scene_description: The player leaves the food vendor behind and continues walking down the wet sidewalk through heavy rain. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks ahead in the same direction, and warm orange light glows from a distant building entrance at the end of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit covered walkway into a rain-drenched urban street. It begins under a purple-hued canopy, moving past a Berkeley Ave sign and glass buildings as a pedestrian passes in the opposite direction. As the camera emerges from the shelter into heavy rain, the environment opens up to reveal vibrant yellow vending machines and the glowing signage of the El Dorado Pawn Shop reflected on the wet pavement. The scene then shifts into a narrow building overhang where a food vendor operates a bright red neon cart, providing a brief respite from the downpour. Finally, the camera leaves the vendor behind to continue down the glistening sidewalk, following a pedestrian with an umbrella toward a warm orange glow emanating from a distant building entrance.
